/usr/bin/cc -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o /Users/cameronm.privacyhub/.config/emacs/elpaca/builds/vterm/vterm-module.so "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/vterm-module.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/utf8.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/elisp.c.o"  libvterm-prefix/src/libvterm/.libs/libvterm.a
